emails.subject: 2/23 Checkout
emails.body: 2/23 Checkout AMEREX All deals checked out fine. PREBON WEST Matt Motley I am missing the following deals: Enron sells Reliant 50 mw of Q3 PV at $375 Enron buys Reliant 50 mw of Q3 SP-15 at $300 Enron sells Williams 25 mw of April SP-15 at $203 Enron sells El Paso 25 mw of June PV at $260 Enron sells Williams 25 mw of March Mid-C at $255 Chris Mallory deal 530108 Prebon shows Enron as seller not buyer BLOOMBERG Diana Scholtes deal 530260 Bloomberg shows 800 total mw....we show 400 total mw... Thanks!
